brand.name: PurpleCraft
brand.tagline: A modern Minecraft server built for adventure and community.

features.title: Survival Reimagined
features.desc: Custom mechanics, fresh biomes, and a thriving economy.

features.title: Epic Dungeons
features.desc: Tackle handcrafted trials with friends for legendary loot.

features.title: Endless Worlds
features.desc: Explore deep caves, lush peaks, and uncharted dimensions.

highlights.title: No Pay-to-Win
highlights.desc: Cosmetics and perks only. Skill always wins.

team.name: Notch
team.bio: Built the world from the first block.

faq.a: Latest Minecraft Java Edition with backwards compatibility down to 1.20.
No whitelist — just connect with the IP and start playing.
No mods required. Optifine and shaders are fully supported but optional.

faq.q: How do I report a player?
faq.a: Use /report in-game or open a ticket in our Discord server.
